title: Lesson 18
paragraph: A daily walk is a comfortable habit for many people. It is convenient when the path is legal, safe, and ordinary enough for beginners. A creative teacher made an accurate map of an ancient street, and an aware guide warned students about rough stones. The gentle pace helped everyone enjoy the walk.

words.example: The map is accurate, so we will not get lost.

words.meaning: very old or from a long time ago
words.example: We visited an ancient temple in the mountains.

words.japaneseMeaning: 気づいている、認識している
words.example: Drivers should be aware of children near schools.
You need a legal document to prove your name.
Daily practice helps you remember new words.

words.meaning: making you feel relaxed or physically good
words.example: This chair is comfortable for long study sessions.

words.meaning: easy and useful for a situation
words.example: The hotel is convenient because it is near the station.

words.meaning: good at making new ideas or things
words.example: A creative student designed the class poster.
The nurse spoke in a gentle voice.

words.meaning: normal and not special or unusual
words.example: It was an ordinary school day until the snow started.
